name: Family floater vs individual health policies for family of 4
description: User with wife and 2 kids weighing a single family floater against separate individual policies for each member

input.message: I have wife and 2 kids. Should I get one family floater or individual policies for each?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response give a balanced comparison and help the user decide based on their situation?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) floater economics (premium savings), (2) risk of shared pool exhaustion, (3) eldest member's age driving premium, (4) individual plan advantage for senior/high-risk members, (5) restoration benefit as mitigation?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the thumb rule accurate — floater works well for young healthy families, individual better when any member is older or has pre-existing conditions?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No recommendation without knowing ages and existing health conditions? Disclaimer present?
